name: Servcorp Limited
analysis: SRV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.6400, stop A$6.1281, target A$7.4381 (1.56:1) — then trail it.
